title: Information Delivery Framework in a Data Warehouse
description: A flowchart illustrating the flow of information from the data warehouse to the end-user, showcasing the various delivery mechanisms and tools.
relationships: Data is extracted from the Data Warehouse and processed by an OLAP Server to create multidimensional cubes
Reporting Tools access the Data Warehouse/Cubes to generate standardized and scheduled reports
Ad-hoc Query Tools allow users to directly interact with the data for custom analysis
Data Mining Tools perform advanced analysis to discover patterns and trends
All tools deliver processed information in various formats (dashboards, reports, alerts) to the End Users for decision making
